title: Cursed Techniques
description: Adding Cursed Techniques from jjk to minecraft
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QKnvV7zfa8s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

So the current items are 

Wheel of adaptation, which summons the wither

Divergent fist. i thought it'd be funny if it explodes on impact so it does.

Nobara's hammer which launches explosive nails

Next is just cursed energy and great cursed energy, its mainly used for crafting so i don't really have much to talk about, crafting recipes will be on the gallery page

SUKUNA’S FINGER. when you eat one you gain buffs, but after like 3 or 4 you get sent to the nether since i couldn't be bothered to add domains and in your place Sukuna Spawns. they can fe found in structures scattered across the map (visual on the gallery page)

Gojo’s blindfold, it gives you blindness but every entity is glowing and you're damn near invincible, although it has low durabillity 

Idle transfiguration. It insta kills but replaces the entity with a transfigured human

There's some cosmetic armor that's not really worth crafting. I added it cause I felt an obligation too

Reversal red is pretty much a scaled down Hollow purple, having a small explosion while hollow purple has a large one
